purpose: Treat split protocol as an experimental variable and decompose random split effects into temporal mixing, near-neighbor exposure, and boundary-purge components.

head_training_policy.scaler: train-only StandardScaler inside each protocol run
head_training_policy.selection: validation macro-F1, tie MCC, tie log_loss

protocol_interpretation_rules.random_window_naive_minus_chronological_: temporal mixing + near-neighbor exposure + purge differences
protocol_interpretation_rules.random_block_purged_minus_chronological_: temporal or regime mixing with near-neighbor risk reduced
protocol_interpretation_rules.chronological_no_purge_minus_chronologic: boundary purge effect proxy on existing kept sample universe

lightweight_panel_note: Step 10 fits train-only PCA@32/PCA@128 and last_snapshot_repeat heads per split run. It does not repeat the full Step 6 MLP-AE representation panel.
split_universe_note: All protocols operate on the existing Step 3 kept 7952-sample subset; Step 3 dropped boundary samples are not restored for chronological_no_purge.
